commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=29ef5d7e5fba06f7e247334df6a48b3ee3679830)
commands.review_summary:
The PR imports reply-payload metadata, treats heartbeat tool-mode raw text without a `heartbeat_respond` payload as empty, and adds a Telegram heartbeat regression test for suppressing raw text.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +27. Total +39 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main sets `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"` for heartbeat response-tool mode, then raw payloads without `heartbeat_respond` fall through to normalization and channel delivery. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author or maintainer follow-up for the payload guard, real behavior proof, and canonical choice between overlapping PRs; this is not a repair-lane candidate while external real proof is missing.

target.title: fix(inbound): suppress raw text reply in message_tool_only heartbeat to prevent leak to Telegram (fixes #94053)
target.body:
## Summary
- Heartbeat runner was leaking raw text replies to Telegram when `visibleReplies: "message_tool"` is set and the model produces text without calling `heartbeat_respond`
- Added a `suppressRawReply` guard that respects `deliverDespiteSourceReplySuppression` metadata so error/system notices still surface

## Changes
- `src/infra/heartbeat-runner.ts`: Added suppressRawReply guard before the empty-reply check (usesHeartbeatResponseTool without heartbeat_respond call suppresses raw text)
- `src/infra/heartbeat-runner.tool-response.test.ts`: Added test verifying raw text suppression in message_tool_only mode

## Verification
- All 16 tests pass (15 existing + 1 new)
- Behavior: suppresses raw text reply when private mode is on and heartbeat_respond tool was not called

Fixes #94053

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: mazhuima
